pi_items.source: Confirmed via download URL (astro.louisville.edu) and FITS headers (SITELAT=38.34, SITELONG=-85.52 for Moore Observatory).
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which creates this directory and writes 40 cropped FITS files.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which expect and create this directory.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real calibrated FITS images of WASP-12b from the University of Louisville, specifically 40 frames cropped to a 1024x1024 central region. The ground truth Coefficient of Variation (CV) map (calculated as standard deviation divided by average) has a verified global mean CV of approximately 0.1131 and a global max CV of approximately 2.2394. The expected file locations are /home/ga/AstroImages/time_series_stack for the input stack and /home/ga/AstroImages/cv_output for the resulting maps and statistics.
